name: Hyperdimension CPU - Chrome Heart
desc: If this card is Link Summoned: You can add 1 "Hyperdimension" Spell from your Deck or GY to your hand. During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Hyperdimension" monster from your GY to a zone this card points to. You can only use each effect of "Hyperdimension CPU - Chrome Heart" once per turn.
